headline: Willis Launches Digital Infrastructure Protector: A Complete End-to-End Lifecycle Solution for Comprehensive Data Center Risk Management
summary: By combining broad insurance policy coverage with tailored risk management support, Willis’ new solution supports maximum operational and financial resiliency for data center clientsNEW YORK, April 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW), today announced the launch of Digital Infrastructure Protector, a new, end-to-end lifecycle solution for data center owners and operators. This solution combines integrated policy coverage during both the construction and operations ph
